text: Delivered commit d510ed7: pivoted configurable QR with rank diagnostics, matrix-RHS QR/Cholesky solves, Q/QT/residual/covariance operations, single-owner DMatBuilder, operator adjoint/composition/scaling/restrictions/block assembly/batch apply, backend compatibility, and a GC-profiled Scalafim workload receipt. Verification: testAllFull (JVM core 427, JS core 424, laws 30 each, full JS links), parity 35, interop 24, vector 27, native 3, FFM 21, benchmark compiles, JMH allocation receipt.
